file_insights.old_purpose: Document full interactive TUI for bop with kanban-board interface (13 source files, 15 snapshot tests)
file_insights.new_purpose: Document AC (Auto-Claude) progress visualization in CLI and Quick Look (single acplan.rs module, 36 tests)
key_additions: ASCII screenshot of bop list with progress bar, N/T subtask count, phase name, half-circle glyph
16-cell block bar rendering format (█ for completed, ░ for remainder)
Quick Look Plan tab description with SF Symbol integration

patterns_discovered.name: Minimal schema addition for feature richness
patterns_discovered.description: Single new `ac_spec_id: Option<String>` field on Meta enables full progress visualization; everything else derived at render time from existing implementation_plan.json
patterns_discovered.evidence: Replaces 13-file TUI implementation with 1 focused module (acplan.rs, 860 lines)

patterns_discovered.name: Dual-layer progress visualization
patterns_discovered.description: Compact inline progress bar in bop list (CLI) mirrors/complements detailed Plan tab in macOS Quick Look preview
patterns_discovered.evidence: Both surfaces read from same implementation_plan.json; progress bar is 1-line summary, Plan tab is full tree

patterns_discovered.name: BMP-safe codepoint selection for glyphs
patterns_discovered.description: Half-circle completion indicators use U+25XX range (○◔◑◕●) instead of SMP/emoji for reliable cross-terminal rendering
patterns_discovered.evidence: Documentation explicitly maps fractions to BMP codepoints; fallback behavior for terminals without glyph support built-in

patterns_discovered.name: File-watching for derived updates
patterns_discovered.description: Watch mode monitors .auto-claude/specs/ for implementation_plan.json changes; triggers display refresh without card state transition
patterns_discovered.evidence: `bop list --watch` behavior documented to reload plan data on subtask progress commits

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: BMP codepoint constraint for cross-platform compatibility
gotchas_discovered.detail: Half-circle glyphs must avoid SMP/emoji (U+1F0xx) due to terminal encoding variance; U+25CB/U+25D4/U+25D1/U+25D5/U+25CF are safe
gotchas_discovered.impact: Limits glyph expressiveness but ensures broad terminal support without fallback issues

gotchas_discovered.detail: Cards without ac_spec_id fall back to existing moon-quarter glyph/percentage display; must not break existing kanban view behavior
gotchas_discovered.impact: Feature is opt-in (requires ac_spec_id); zero risk to cards without AC specs

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Plan file watch mode needs debouncing
gotchas_discovered.detail: Multiple dispatcher commits to implementation_plan.json within same second could trigger redundant reloads
gotchas_discovered.impact: Watch implementation needs throttle/debounce to avoid display flicker during rapid subtask updates

gotchas_discovered.detail: Current phase name is truncated in progress line; long phase names could be ambiguous
gotchas_discovered.impact: Should either increase truncation limit or add tooltip/detail view for full phase name

approach_outcome.complexity_reduction: From 13-file TUI implementation to 1-module focused feature
approach_outcome.scope_shift: Abandoned full interactive kanban TUI in favor of integrated AC progress visualization
approach_outcome.test_coverage: 36 tests in acplan.rs module (vs 15 insta snapshot tests in original TUI)
approach_outcome.deliverable: ASCII screenshot + Quick Look description + architecture summary; all AC progress surfaces documented

recommendations.item: Create glyph design guide documenting BMP-safe codepoint selection rationale for future progress indicators
Implement file-watch debounce (200ms) in bop list watch mode to prevent rapid re-renders during multi-commit bursts from AC agents
Increase phase name truncation limit to 32+ characters or implement tooltip on hover showing full phase name and current subtask tree
Add integration test verifying watch mode reloads plan data on .auto-claude/specs/NNN/implementation_plan.json file change
Verify Quick Look Plan tab renders same half-circle glyph and block bar as CLI; coordinate color palette between macOS SF Symbol rendering and terminal ANSI codes
